quotes.text: grug very impressed with type systems when young grug. type systems shiny and wonderful. then grug mass mass if/else on union type and mass mass casting everywhere and grug not mass impressed anymore.

quotes.text: Simple is not easy. Easy is near to our capabilities. Simple is about lack of interleaving. They are completely orthogonal.
quotes.author: Rich Hickey

quotes.text: Some people, when confronted with a problem, think 'I know, I'll use regular expressions.' Now they have two problems.
quotes.author: Jamie Zawinski
